paper_focus.title: Low-density nano-bainitic Al–C steels
paper_focus.research_objective: To clarify the influence of high C–Al contents, Ti microalloying, and heat treatment parameters on bainitic transformation kinetics and mechanical properties in low-density nano-bainitic steels.
material_systems: Low-density nano-bainitic Al–C steels: Fe-C-Al-Si-Mn-Mo-(B) system
Ti-microalloyed variant S4 with Ni addition
Low C–Al alloyed S5 containing 0.60% C, 3.92% Al, 0.78% Ni
Key phases: bainite, retained austenite, polygonal ferrite, martensite, (Fe,M)xCy, TiMoC, AlN
main_process_variables: Alloy composition (C, Al, Mn, Si, Mo, B, Ti, Ni)
